case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. JEFRIN A. CRUZ SUAZO

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SUAZO, JEFRIN A. CRUZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUAZO, JEFRIN A. CRUZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-21-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JEFRIN A. CRUZ SUAZO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
